news_angle: Astronomers have finally figured out why Saturn's magnetic field is twisted, resolving a decades-long scientific mystery.
why_this_is_news: This is a recent breakthrough discovery in planetary science that reveals new insights into Saturn’s magnetic behavior, an elusive puzzle for decades.
specific_action: Scientists solved the decades-old mystery of why the magnetic field is twisted
scene_metaphor: Hunk Mao as a cosmic detective unraveling invisible magnetic mysteries among the swirling rings of Saturn
image_prompt: Anime-style cool orange tabby cat with expressive large eyes and mischievous confident grin, wearing a sleek black hoodie and futuristic visor, dynamic pose floating near a detailed, vibrant Saturn with exaggerated glowing twisted magnetic field lines and swirling rings, cosmic background with stars and nebulae, cinematic lighting emphasizing mystery and discovery vibes
easter_eggs: Hidden tiny cat paw prints embedded subtly on Saturn's rings; Hunk Mao's chain shaped like a small planet; faint silhouette of a robot Mars rover in background
caption: Scientists finally cracked the code on Saturn’s twisted magnetic field after decades of mystery. Hunk Mao’s ready to sleuth through space—magnetically charged and mischievous as ever.
risk_notes: Ensure no logos or branding appear; avoid making Hunk Mao look overly realistic or rounded; keep the vibe energetic and stylish but not promotional.
